rows.label: qev031202_MSG0001
rows.name:
Eek...!
Y-You... What are you doing in a place like this?
You don't have business with us, do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031202_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you came to catch Leroy.

rows.label: qev031202_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev031202_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what they are doing in this place instead.

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0002
rows.name:
Wh... You were asked by her father?!
Wh-What should we do, Lavina![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0003
rows.name:
Um, we're... waiting!
Yeah! We're waiting for someone.
Right, Lavina?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0004
rows.name:
Y-Yeah! That's right.
So we aren't being suspicious at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0005
rows.name: And you are...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Huh? You came looking for Lavina?
Could it be... her father asked you...?
Wh-What should we do, Lavina![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0007
rows.name:
Calm down.
I'm absolutely not going to leave your side, Leroy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0008
rows.name:
...I don't know what my father told you, but
I'm here of my own free will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0009
rows.name:
So please, go home.
Don't ruin our happiness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev031202_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask about their circumstances.

rows.label: qev031202_JNK0040
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev031202_SEL0041
rows.name: Try to convince them to return with you.

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0010
rows.name:
I love Leroy.
But... my father won't approve of me marrying an Earthling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0011
rows.name:
He tried to force me to marry that brute,
Wazdo Tygant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0012
rows.name:
That's why I left home like this,
and we're living hidden away from the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0013
rows.name:
From the bottom of my heart, I love this unreliable,
cowardly Leroy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0014
rows.name:
If you plan to tear my love for Leroy apart,
I'll show you I'm ready to die right here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Hey, I have a favor to ask.
I want you to bring me a Sapphire Single-Horn taken from a
Lumedel and a Ringstone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0016
rows.name:
If you bring them to me, I'll go show my face
to my father one time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'm begging you, alright? If I have those,
and Leroy has just a tiny bit of courage...
Everything will work out perfectly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0018
rows.name: ...Huh!? Me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0019
rows.name: We can't keep running away forever, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0020
rows.name:
So, I want Leroy to prepare himself too.
That is, if you still love me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0021
rows.name: Prepare... myself?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG0022
rows.name:
We'll talk about the details after we get the horn and stone.
Then... I'll tell you everything properly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG1001
rows.name:
Bias people are scary, you know...
My legs shake every time I see them.
That's why we were hiding in a place like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG1002
rows.name:
But... It's not like I took her away from her clan
with half-hearted feelings either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG1003
rows.name:
If she's telling me to prepare myself,
I want to do my best... and take that step forward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2001
rows.name:
H-Hey!
Did you see Lavina around here!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2002
rows.name:
She disappeared while I went out to buy some things
for just a bit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2003
rows.name:
Hey... Do you think... maybe she got sick of me
and left...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031202_SEL0051
rows.name: Say that the possibility is high.

rows.label: qev031202_JNK0060
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031202_SEL0061
rows.name: Reassure him that there's no way that happened.

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2004
rows.name:
Ugh... You're a harsh person.
I wanted you to deny it, at least a little bit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2005
rows.name:
But even if that's the case, I won't give up.
No matter how many times she dumps me, I'll chase after her,
catch her, and cling to her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2006
rows.name:
Oh, right... Hey, did you manage to get
the Sapphire Single-Horn and the Ringstone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2007
rows.name: Thank you... You're really kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2008
rows.name:
You're right. The love between me and her
ain't something that's gonna disappear so easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2009
rows.name:
I absolutely won't give up!
Hey, did you manage to get
the Sapphire Single-Horn and the Ringstone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2010
rows.name:
I'm... scared to go outside, but...
I'm going to go look for Lavina.
I have to give these to her quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2011
rows.name:
I have an idea of where she might be.
Near the Shaded Beach, west of NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG2012
rows.name:
If she made a big decision and left,
she's definitely waiting there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG3001
rows.name:
I... I'll become family not just with Lavina,
but with all the Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG3002
rows.name:
Everyone loves Lavina just as much as I do.
So I'm sure we can understand each other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG4001
rows.name:
Thank you very much... for everything with Lavina.
Because a strong person like you was there,
I was able to stay strong too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG4002
rows.name:
In order to be accepted by her father...
First, I think I'll do my absolute best
at my job as a BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031202_MSG4003
rows.name:
After all, for a man, it starts with his job... right?
I'll absolutely make sure we end up together.[ST:wait ]
